keyInsights: TinyML enables ML on MCUs with <1mW power
MCUNet achieves >70% ImageNet on commercial MCUs
Quantization (INT8) reduces model size 3-4x with minimal accuracy loss
TinyEngine outperforms TF-Lite Micro by 1.7-3.3x speed, 3.4x memory
NAS for TinyML optimizes for memory/latency, not just accuracy
MobileNetV3 is the reference backbone for edge vision tasks
QAT maintains accuracy under aggressive quantization
CMSIS-NN is the standard kernel library for ARM Cortex-M TinyML
Model pruning can achieve 50%+ size reduction with <1% accuracy drop
Knowledge distillation transfers reasoning from teacher to student
ONNX Runtime provides dynamic/static quantization for edge deployment
OpenVINO is Intel's toolkit for optimized inference on Intel hardware
NPU is specialized hardware for ML inference with high efficiency
Edge TPU (Google Coral) provides 4 TOPS at 2W for edge inference
Federated Learning enables distributed training without sharing raw data
